name: Cherry Oat Dessert Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, nuts, oats, margarine, and flour until crumbly.
3. Reserve 1-1/2 cups of the mixture.
4. Press the reserved mixture into the bottom of a 9" square baking dish.
5. Stir cinnamon into the cherry filling.
6. Spread the cherry filling over the crust.
7. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs over the top, pressing lightly.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Cool and cut into squares.
